items.title: Arsenal sign Real Madrid goalkeeper Rodriguez
items.summary: Arsenal have completed the free signing of former Real Madrid captain and goalkeeper Misa Rodriguez.

items.title: What shirt number will Morgan Rogers wear for Chelsea?
items.summary: MORGAN Rogers will wear the Blue of Chelsea next season, following his record breaking switch. The £117million fee was a British record, breaking the record set earlier in the window by Elliot Anderson. items.title: Arsenal sign Spain goalkeeper Rodriguez on free
items.summary: Arsenal bring in Spain goalkeeper Misa Rodriguez on a free transfer - the Women's Super League side's sixth signing of the summer.

items.title: Sky Sports News host reveals horror of second, incorrect cancer diagnosis three years on from being given all-clear
items.summary: SKY SPORTS NEWS presenter Jo Wilson has revealed the horrifying story of her receiving an incorrect cancer diagnosis three years after being given the all-clear. items.title: 'Frustrated' Newcastle will demand £80m for Arsenal target Guimaraes
items.summary: Newcastle are frustrated with Arsenal's pursuit of Bruno Guimaraes and will only consider selling him for upwards of £80m, according to Sky Sports News ' North East reporter Keith Downie.

items.title: Where are Newcastle in bid to be the best by 2030?
items.summary: As the fifth anniversary of Newcastle's takeover approaches, BBC Sport assesses whether the project to be "the best" is still on track.

items.summary: A CONSORTIUM looking at buying a stake in Liverpool has approached Amazon tycoon Jeff Bezos over joining their bid. items.summary: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team explain the major changes happening to football's international breaks starting in September 2026

items.title: Why many Black Americans were rooting for Argentina to lose the World Cup | Etan Thomas
items.summary: Many Black Americans were not cheering Spain’s complicated history. They were rooting against the racism, politics and silence associated with Argentina There are moments in sports when you realize people aren’t just watching the score any more. They’re watching values. They’re watching who speaks.

items.title: USA could host another World Cup as soon as 2038… despite England not hosting for over SIXTY YEARS
items.summary: THE USA could host the World Cup in 2038 despite the 2026 tournament only just wrapping up in the nation. items.title: Legendary commentator, 80, plays first few seconds of pre-season clash after having training ground named in his honour
items.summary: MARTIN TYLER played the first few seconds of a pre-season friendly as his boyhood team's training ground was named after him. The iconic commentator, 80, is a lifelong Woking fan and has been involved with the National League side in various capacities down the years, including as first-team coach.

items.title: Fan group launch stinging attack on Fifa over ‘World Cup that failed supporters’ with ‘serious concerns’ over next hosts
items.summary: A FOOTBALL fan group has slammed Fifa for the 2026 World Cup and are already worried about what's to come in 2030.
